content: vite-plugin-pwa 1.3.0 (latest). Register as VitePWA() plugin in vite.config.ts. Key config: registerType: 'autoUpdate', workbox.globPatterns: ['**\/*.{js,css,html,ico,png,svg}']. PWA manifest scope and start_url must be explicitly set when using a subdirectory base path (GitHub Pages). PWA manifest icon paths do not auto-prepend base — must reference icons with base-relative paths. Workbox precaches all matched assets for offline use.
